prompt: Someone reported that arrowheads look wrong in the converted draw.io output for the FSM example (test/directed/fsm.gv.txt). Can you investigate and tell me if the report is real?
assertions: Produced both a graphviz reference PNG and a converted draw.io PNG of fsm.gv.txt (image files present in outputs)
Verdict on the bug report is backed by visual inspection of the rendered images, not solely XML/code analysis
Report gives an explicit verdict on whether the arrowhead report is real (confirmed, refuted, or partially confirmed)
Report describes the specific arrowhead behavior observed (presence, direction, or style) in the converted output
